faq.title: Still have questions?
faq.q1: Why do I need to enter my card for the free trial?
faq.a1: We request the card to ensure that only real users committed to growth access our AI technology. You won't be charged anything today and can cancel with one click before the end of the 14 days.
faq.a2: No, it works together. Qualify organizes the information that comes through WhatsApp, allowing you to manage the sales funnel and operation professionally.
faq.q3: What happens if I exceed the client limit?
faq.a3: You can continue managing your leads in the funnel, but to move new clients to operational stages, you'll need to upgrade to the next plan.
faq.q4: Is my data and my clients' data secure?
faq.a4: Totally. We use bank-level encryption and secure servers to ensure your database is private and protected.
